campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transportation funding investments, adopt a new policy restricting city property use for federal civil enforcement activities, and discuss efforts to fill open city positions and improve employee retention.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New city policy prohibiting use of city property for federal civil enforcement
Open city job positions and strategies to recruit and retain employees

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing to address concerns about plans to clean up hazardous conditions on certain properties in Saratoga that were flagged by the County. The council also approved a new technology policy for the city and established a process for residents to request accommodations if they need them.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement ordered by County
New City Council Technology Disruption Policy adoption
Process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial reports, accept a donation of emergency medical equipment, and authorize several contracts for road paving and services. The council also approved a list of projects for the upcoming fiscal year and applied for state grants.
keyTopics: Approved March 2026 financial and investment reports
Accepted donation of Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Authorized construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Submitted grant applications for state funding
Adopted project list for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to review upcoming agendas and plan their schedule. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, so the council reviewed the draft agenda for June 2 and discussed adding new items and setting time limits for certain discussions.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26 council meeting
June 2 draft agenda review and additions
Updates to Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan
Updates to Rules and Open Government Committee work plan
Council-sponsored events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve previous meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas for various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for 2026-27
Public comment period
Review of city board and commission schedules

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, to recognize Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The council opened with a flag salute and special observances for these two community initiatives.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month designation
April meeting minutes review

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety Element, which is part of the long-range General Plan that guides development through 2040. The council also recognized the Public Works Department for their work maintaining streets, sidewalks, trees, and city facilities, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update to the 2015-2040 General Plan
Public Works Department recognition during Public Works Week
Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month celebration

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara held a special meeting of the Station Area Task Force on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss plans related to the station area. The meeting was open to the public both in person and online via Zoom.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall, 1500 Warburton Avenue
Public participation available in-person and via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they considered several land development permits, passed new city rules through urgency and regular ordinances, approved a site development permit amendment, and appointed a permanent city manager.
keyTopics: New urgency ordinance and regular ordinance
Site development permit amendment and vesting tentative map approval
Property assessment confirmation and ordering
Permanent city manager appointment

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council heard an update on the city's residential electrification program, which aims to help homes switch from gas to electric heating and appliances. The council discussed proposed principles to guide these electrification programs so the city can comply with upcoming air quality regulations.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update and progress to date
Proposed principles to guide electrification assistance programs
Air District regulation compliance requirements for the city
Committee member comments and announcements
